dj_text: That was Kaliber "Vest For København". Let's keep the mood going with Rolig - Rolig. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: Brought to you by NoodleCorp — we put noodles in everything. Noodle soup. Noodle salad. Noodle coffee. Noodle mattress.
recovery_text: HOW are they on our frequency?! That dimension doesn't even HAVE frequencies!
title: Rolig - Rolig
